zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Ireland於大約1295年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，他的父親Lord Adam Ireland28歲，母親Avena de Holland22歲。他於1316年與Avena de Villiers結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈斯恩享年88歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ireland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: ethnic name denoting someone from Ireland, from Middle English Irland, Irlond, Erlond (Old English Īraland). The country gets its name from the genitive case of Old English Īras ‘Irishmen’ + land ‘land’. The stem Īr- is taken from the Celtic name for Ireland, Èriu, earlier Everiu. The Latin name was (H)ibernia. The surname is especially common in Liverpool, England, which has a large Irish population. Compare Irish .

variants.name: Irelan
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irland
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irish
meanings: English and Irish (Kilkenny): ethnic name for someone of Irish origin, from Old French Ireis or Middle English Irish ‘Irish’, Latinized as Hiberniens(is). Compare Ireland .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Ireland was born about 1295, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Adam Ireland, was 28 and his mother, Avena de Holland, was 22. He married Avena de Villiers in 1316. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died in 1382, in Hartshorne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Ireland est né environ 1295, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Adam Ireland, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Avena de Holland, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Avena de Villiers en 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1382, à Hartshorne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans.

Lui sposato Avena de Villiers nel 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì nel 1382, nel Hartshorne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Irelandが約1295年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Adam Irelandは28歳，母Avena de Hollandは22歳であった。1316年にAvena de Villiersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハートショルンで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Ireland(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Adam Ireland(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Avena de Holland(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1316년 Avena de Villiers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하츠호른에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Avena de Villiers em 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1382, em Hartshorne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 88 anos.

ro.Upholland, Lancashire, England: Up Holland, Lancashire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Ireland родился около 1295 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Adam Ireland было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Avena de Holland, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Avena de Villiers в 1316 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1382 г. в местности харцхаурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет.
